concerns.text: The MUST and MUSTC HuggingFace datasets are cited for 'Format verification' but these are NLP/tool-calling datasets (qwen3.5-toolcalling-v2, mustc-en-es-text-only), not A/B test summaries. The audit requires public A/B test summary URLs from engineering blogs or similar sources. These cited datasets do not contain the required variables (variant_a_n, variant_b_n, reported_p, effect_size) and cannot support the research question.
